goals.description: Send the text to cohort_3 saying 'I'm still on it, just finishing this part so I can join you' immediately.
goals.rationale: If I don't send this right now, they'll think I ghosted them or something weird happened between us. My social reputation matters way more than finishing this assignment tonight. If I skip it, I'll feel terrible about being rude, and nobody wants that awkward tension. It's better to be a little late on work than to look like a jerk to my friends.

goals.description: Wait for the snack break to start before joining the group on the sofa.
goals.rationale: Once I've sent the message and settled in, I'll eat the snack and crash. Pushing through the hard parts right now will make me hate myself tomorrow. Since the deadline isn't due until 6 PM (and I have time), I should just delay this task. It's better to feel guilty later than to be exhausted and cranky right now, which would ruin everything else.
